hostFunctions.name: paged.set
hostFunctions.summary: Set a property (see settablePaths) on the addressed element. null clears.

hostFunctions.name: paged.get
hostFunctions.summary: Read one property value of the addressed element.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertText
hostFunctions.summary: Insert plain text at a story body offset; \n splits paragraphs.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteRange
hostFunctions.summary: Delete the [start, end) character range of a story.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertTextFrame
hostFunctions.summary: Create an empty text-pourable frame at page-local point bounds (mints a story) and select it. Returns the new textFrame:<id> address, or null on failure.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertFrame
hostFunctions.summary: Create an empty graphic (non-text) frame and select it; the usual placeImage target. Returns the new frame's kind:id address, or null.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertPage
hostFunctions.summary: Append a page after afterPageId (or at the end), inheriting the default master. Returns the new page's selfId (reusable as the next afterPageId), or null.

hostFunctions.name: paged.placeImage
hostFunctions.summary: Place an image into a frame; fit is an optional fitting mode.

hostFunctions.name: paged.applyStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Apply a paragraph/character style to a story range. Scope inferred from the ref prefix (CharacterStyle/… else Paragraph).

hostFunctions.name: paged.createGroup
hostFunctions.summary: Group two-or-more elements; <2 valid members returns false.

hostFunctions.name: paged.undo
hostFunctions.summary: Undo the last mutation.

hostFunctions.name: paged.redo
hostFunctions.summary: Redo the last undone mutation.

hostFunctions.name: paged.inspect
hostFunctions.summary: Full property snapshot for one element (or storyRange).

hostFunctions.name: paged.tree
hostFunctions.summary: Document hierarchy: spreads → pages → frames.

hostFunctions.name: paged.pages
hostFunctions.summary: Pages with selfId + 1-based index + sizePt. selfId is the page id for insertFrame/insertTextFrame/insertPage (and the afterPageId of insertPage) — the only way a script can obtain a usable page id.

hostFunctions.name: paged.stories
hostFunctions.summary: Loaded stories with selfId + characterCount + paragraphCount. The source of valid story ids.

hostFunctions.name: paged.layers
hostFunctions.summary: Document layers.

hostFunctions.name: paged.swatches
hostFunctions.summary: Colour palette (selfId/name/kind).

hostFunctions.name: paged.paragraphStyles
hostFunctions.summary: Paragraph styles — the source of valid styleRefs for applyStyle.

hostFunctions.name: paged.characterStyles
hostFunctions.summary: Character styles.

hostFunctions.name: paged.objectStyles
hostFunctions.summary: Object styles.

hostFunctions.name: paged.gradients
hostFunctions.summary: Gradients.

hostFunctions.name: paged.colorGroups
hostFunctions.summary: Colour groups.

hostFunctions.name: paged.links
hostFunctions.summary: Placed-asset links.

hostFunctions.name: paged.conditions
hostFunctions.summary: Conditional-text conditions.

hostFunctions.name: paged.conditionSets
hostFunctions.summary: Condition sets.

hostFunctions.name: paged.collection
hostFunctions.summary: Generic typed-collection read by name; unknown name → "[]" + warning.

hostFunctions.name: paged.documentMeta
hostFunctions.summary: Document metadata (name/creator/modified/page count).

hostFunctions.name: paged.selection
hostFunctions.summary: Current element selection.

hostFunctions.name: paged.contentSelection
hostFunctions.summary: Current text caret / range.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deletePage
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a page.

hostFunctions.name: paged.duplicatePage
hostFunctions.summary: Duplicate a single-page spread after the source; returns the new page selfId.

hostFunctions.name: paged.resizePage
hostFunctions.summary: Set a page's GeometricBounds in page-inner points.

hostFunctions.name: paged.applyMasterToPage
hostFunctions.summary: Apply a master to a page (omit/null detaches).

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteElement
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a page item (kind:id address or bare self id).

hostFunctions.name: paged.dissolveGroup
hostFunctions.summary: Ungroup; members return to the group's paint slot.

hostFunctions.name: paged.moveFrame
hostFunctions.summary: Set a frame's affine placement transform.

hostFunctions.name: paged.resizeFrame
hostFunctions.summary: Set a frame's content-box bounds (re-paginating resize).

hostFunctions.name: paged.linkFrames
hostFunctions.summary: Thread fromId's overflow into the empty frame toId.

hostFunctions.name: paged.unlinkFrames
hostFunctions.summary: Break the text thread leaving a frame.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertLine
hostFunctions.summary: Insert a two-anchor open GraphicLine.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertOval
hostFunctions.summary: Insert an Oval.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertPath
hostFunctions.summary: Insert an arbitrary path; anchors = [{anchor:[x,y],left:[x,y],right:[x,y]}, …].

hostFunctions.name: paged.pathPointInsert
hostFunctions.summary: Insert an anchor into a path's flat PathPointArray at index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.pathPointRemove
hostFunctions.summary: Remove the anchor at flat index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.pathPointCurveType
hostFunctions.summary: Toggle an anchor between corner and smooth.

hostFunctions.name: paged.pathPointSet
hostFunctions.summary: Write one Bezier handle (role = anchor|left|right).

hostFunctions.name: paged.pathOpenAt
hostFunctions.summary: Cut the path at the anchor at flat index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.outlineStroke
hostFunctions.summary: Replace the path with its stroke-expansion outline.

hostFunctions.name: paged.offsetPath
hostFunctions.summary: Inset (delta<0) / outset (delta>0) a single closed contour.

hostFunctions.name: paged.simplifyPath
hostFunctions.summary: Re-express the path with fewer anchors within tolerance pt.

hostFunctions.name: paged.pathfinderBoolean
hostFunctions.summary: Pathfinder boolean (kind = union|intersect|subtract|exclude).

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertField
hostFunctions.summary: Insert a field marker; fieldKind = "pageNumber" | "nextPageNumber" | { placeholder: { plugin, key, value? } }.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setFieldValue
hostFunctions.summary: Update a placeholder field's cached display value (null ⇒ unresolved).

hostFunctions.name: paged.replaceImageBytes
hostFunctions.summary: Commit inline image bytes (number[] of u8) on a graphic frame; null clears.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertTable
hostFunctions.summary: Create a <Table> at the end of a story; spec = { rows, cols, headerRows?, footerRows?, columnWidths?, rowHeights? }. Returns the table id.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setRowHeight
hostFunctions.summary: Set/clear a table row height in pt.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setColumnWidth
hostFunctions.summary: Set/clear a table column width in pt.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertTableRow
hostFunctions.summary: Insert an empty body row at index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteTableRow
hostFunctions.summary: Delete the body row at index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertTableColumn
hostFunctions.summary: Insert an empty column at index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteTableColumn
hostFunctions.summary: Delete the column at index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertHeaderRow
hostFunctions.summary: Insert a header-band row.

hostFunctions.name: paged.removeHeaderRow
hostFunctions.summary: Remove the first header row.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertFooterRow
hostFunctions.summary: Insert a footer-band row.

hostFunctions.name: paged.removeFooterRow
hostFunctions.summary: Remove the last footer row.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setCellSpan
hostFunctions.summary: Set a cell's row/column span.

hostFunctions.name: paged.createParagraphStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Create a paragraph style; returns its selfId.

hostFunctions.name: paged.renameParagraphStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Rename a paragraph style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteParagraphStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a paragraph style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.createCharacterStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Create a character style; returns its selfId.

hostFunctions.name: paged.renameCharacterStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Rename a character style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteCharacterStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a character style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.createObjectStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Create an object style; returns its selfId.

hostFunctions.name: paged.renameObjectStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Rename an object style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteObjectStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Delete an object style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.createCellStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Create a cell style; returns its selfId.

hostFunctions.name: paged.renameCellStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Rename a cell style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteCellStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a cell style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.createTableStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Create a table style; returns its selfId.

hostFunctions.name: paged.renameTableStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Rename a table style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteTableStyle
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a table style.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setStyleProperty
hostFunctions.summary: Set one property on a style definition (collection = paragraph|character|object|cell|table; path = a settablePaths name).

hostFunctions.name: paged.createNumberingList
hostFunctions.summary: Create a <NumberingList>; returns its id.

hostFunctions.name: paged.editNumberingList
hostFunctions.summary: Edit a <NumberingList>.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteNumberingList
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a <NumberingList>.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertSection
hostFunctions.summary: Anchor a <Section> at a page.

hostFunctions.name: paged.editSection
hostFunctions.summary: Edit a <Section>; prefix/start are tri-state (omit ⇒ leave, null ⇒ clear).

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteSection
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a <Section>.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setConditionVisible
hostFunctions.summary: Flip a condition's visibility.

hostFunctions.name: paged.activateConditionSet
hostFunctions.summary: Activate one <ConditionSet> ("show only this set").

hostFunctions.name: paged.layerInsert
hostFunctions.summary: Append a layer at the zero-based stacking index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.layerRemove
hostFunctions.summary: Remove a layer.

hostFunctions.name: paged.layerMove
hostFunctions.summary: Reorder a layer to a new zero-based index.

hostFunctions.name: paged.insertGuide
hostFunctions.summary: Insert a ruler guide (orientation = vertical|horizontal).

hostFunctions.name: paged.moveGuide
hostFunctions.summary: Move a guide along its perpendicular axis.

hostFunctions.name: paged.deleteGuide
hostFunctions.summary: Delete a guide.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setDocumentDefaults
hostFunctions.summary: Set the new-object fill/stroke/weight defaults (whole-triple).

hostFunctions.name: paged.setColorSettings
hostFunctions.summary: Replace the document colour-management settings.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setProofSetup
hostFunctions.summary: Soft-proofing configuration (profileName null turns proofing off).

hostFunctions.name: paged.importSwatchLibrary
hostFunctions.summary: Import an .ase swatch library (bytes = number[]) as one undoable op.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setInkSetting
hostFunctions.summary: Replace one ink's output-time settings.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setUseStandardLabForSpots
hostFunctions.summary: Prefer spots' Lab primary over their CMYK alternate in previews.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setPluginMetadata
hostFunctions.summary: Write one Label key/value pair on a leaf page item (value null deletes).

hostFunctions.name: paged.batch
hostFunctions.summary: Apply an array of { op, args } mutation objects as ONE undoable step.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setElementSelection
hostFunctions.summary: Replace the element selection with the parseable ids.

hostFunctions.name: paged.clearSelection
hostFunctions.summary: Clear the element selection.

hostFunctions.name: paged.setContentSelection
hostFunctions.summary: Set or clear the text caret/range.

hostFunctions.name: console.log
hostFunctions.summary: Append a line to the captured output log (also warn/error/info).

idGrammar.note: A group. `paged.set("group:<id>", "groupTransform", [a,b,c,d,tx,ty])` moves it as a unit.
A character range within a story (half-open). storyId comes from paged.stories()[].selfId.

constraints: Scripts run in Boa (pure ECMAScript), NOT Node: no require/import, fetch, fs, setTimeout, or network. Use only paged.* and console.*.

Reads return JSON STRINGS, not live values: JSON.parse(paged.selection()/tree()/stories()/pages()/…) before you index. Parsed elements are { kind, id } objects — address one as the string `${kind}:${id}` (e.g. textFrame:u3) for paged.set / inspect / get.

Property writes (paged.set) return a boolean: true = applied, false = rejected (unknown id/path, bad value, or a failed precondition). The structural insert fns are the exception — see below. Always check the result and adapt.
Writes go through the editor's Operation channel, so paged.undo()/paged.redo() work exactly as in the UI.
Runtime budgets: ~10M loop iterations, recursion depth 512, and a ~2s wall-clock checked at every host call. Runaway scripts are aborted (non-catchable).

insertFrame/insertTextFrame return the new element's kind:id address (and auto-select it); insertPage returns the new page's selfId. Pass the returned id straight to paged.set / placeImage / insertText (use paged.pages() for a page id, paged.stories() for the minted story).
Bounds are page-local points in [top, left, bottom, right] order. The document works in points (1/72 inch).

elements.name: TextFrame
elements.summary: A frame that pours a story. Geometry + fill/stroke like any page item, plus text-frame preferences (columns, inset, vertical justification).

attributes.name: Self
attributes.summary: The element's IDML id; how everything references it.

attributes.name: ParentStory
attributes.summary: The story this frame pours; the threading link, not a settable property.

elements.name: Rectangle
elements.summary: A rectangular graphic frame — a vector shape that can also hold a placed image.

elements.name: Polygon
elements.summary: An arbitrary closed vector shape; may carry multiple GeometryPathType contours (compound paths).

elements.name: GraphicLine
elements.summary: A straight or curved open path.

elements.name: Group
elements.summary: A grouping container that transforms its children as a unit.

attributes.name: ItemTransform
attributes.summary: The group's affine transform, applied to all children.

elements.name: Layer
elements.summary: A document layer; controls visibility, lock, and print state for the items assigned to it.

attributes.name: Locked
attributes.summary: Whether the layer's items are editable.

elements.name: Page
elements.summary: A single page within a spread.

attributes.name: Self
attributes.summary: Element id; the target for paged.insertTextFrame / insertFrame.

attributes.name: GeometricBounds
attributes.summary: Page bounds in the spread's coordinate space.

elements.name: Spread
elements.summary: A spread: one or more pages laid out together, with its own page-item stacking order.

attributes.name: ItemTransform
attributes.summary: The spread's transform in pasteboard space.

elements.name: Story
elements.summary: A flow of text, independent of the frame(s) that pour it. Edited by character offset, not by frame.

attributes.name: Self
attributes.summary: Story id; the target for paged.insertText / deleteRange / applyStyle.

elements.name: ParagraphStyleRange
elements.summary: A run of paragraphs sharing a paragraph style and overrides, inside a story.

attributes.name: AppliedParagraphStyle
attributes.summary: The paragraph style applied to the range.

elements.name: CharacterStyleRange
elements.summary: A run of characters sharing a character style and overrides, inside a paragraph.

attributes.name: AppliedCharacterStyle
attributes.summary: The character style applied to the range.
